# target

**Instance Property**

The kind of texture pointed to by the texture stage. See [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKTextureTarget].

## Declaration

```swift
var target: GLKTextureTarget { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKTextureTarget/target2D].

## Configuring Texture Properties

- **enabled**: A Boolean value that indicates whether this texture is used to texture drawn primitives.
- **envMode**: The mode the texture uses to compute its output fragment color. See [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKTextureEnvMode].
- **name**: The OpenGL name for the texture being sampled by this texture stage.
